name: Stalwart JMAP
description: Typed Stalwart JMAP tools for email, calendars, contacts, and raw JMAP escape hatches.

baseUrl.label: Base URL
baseUrl.help: Base Stalwart URL, for example https://mail.example.com

sessionUrl.label: Session URL
sessionUrl.help: Optional explicit discovery URL, for example https://mail.example.com/.well-known/jmap or https://mail.example.com/jmap

username.label: Username
username.help: Mailbox address or login name for Basic auth

accountId.label: Account ID
accountId.help: Optional default JMAP account id override

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the Stalwart server, for example https://mail.example.com

sessionUrl.description: Optional explicit JMAP discovery URL, for example https://mail.example.com/.well-known/jmap or https://mail.example.com/jmap

username.description: JMAP username for Basic auth, usually the mailbox address

password.description: Password for Basic auth. Prefer OAuth accessToken if possible.

accessToken.description: OAuth bearer token for JMAP. Preferred over password.

accountId.description: Optional default JMAP account id. Per-tool accountId parameters still override this.

identityId.description: Optional default JMAP identity id for sending mail. If omitted, the plugin resolves one via Identity/get.
